title: Binary Trees & BST

quiz.question: What traversal of a BST produces sorted output?
quiz.explanation: Inorder traversal (Left, Root, Right) visits BST nodes in ascending order.

quiz.question: What is the worst-case time complexity for BST operations?
quiz.explanation: A skewed BST degrades to a linked list, making operations O(n).

quiz.question: Which data structure is used for prefix-based searching?
quiz.explanation: Trie (prefix tree) efficiently stores and searches strings by prefix.
